About Me

I'm M. Shoyab Sadik, a BSc EEE student at IUBAT with deep passion for electronics, robotics, and IoT. As Founder & CEO of Pico Robotics, I lead project and product development while also instructing workshops for 350+ students across school, college, and university levels on Arduino, ESP32, and mobile app development.
